clusters.justification: These terms delineate the macro-functional domain of valence, physiological arousal, and homeostatic regulation that characteristically co-activate within the salience and deep limbic brain networks.

This cluster reflects the computation of expected utility, incentive salience, and reinforcement mapping generally segregated within the macroscopic dopaminergic, orbitofrontal, and striatal circuitry.

These concepts map reliably onto the default mode network's functional role in processing internally directed thought, establishing representations of the self, and inferring the internal states of other agents.
